{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231813099DD9713E9972FFBC84C0"}"},"total":464},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7362179253097005886","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，将我心中的备备写出来了，不将仁义道德挂嘴上，不假仁假义。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714143657,"group_id":"7212512503647964175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1sg6IBbafXDwNKq3fEHBgpNIKkp7Hmk3gA5MetAHCMS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/006a484945f74a64a8ec153292948199~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787788&x-signature=LBSaptBqb6jSjVa2jmWsgOqROoY%3D","user_id":"3263781791610141","user_name":"狗头道人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3263781791610141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7212512503647964175","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统+权谋+辅刘+厚黑谋主+不黑不吹+杀伐果断+纵横捭阖+群像+圣母勿入）
丘衡穿越到三国时代，原本准备辅佐曹操早日一统。
但在已然壮大的曹军之中，没有名气就没有出头之日。
直至博望坡，夏侯惇斩断了丘衡翻身的希望。
也就在此时，他遇见了尚在落魄时期的刘备。
厚黑军师遇上心机主公，自此，开始了天下第一谋主的生涯……
特别提示:既不是三国志也不是三国演义，请勿先入为主。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e6d3853dfbe16c91bb038e3e977d4fcb","author":"故尘有哀","author_id":"","book_id":"7212512503647964175","book_name":"三国：地狱开局，从新野逆转天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5412人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7212512722666619426","read_count":"5412","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1017571"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"503","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e1e6bd200bf541bb6c953c552062ac07~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444789&x-signature=4AYKqCh75XiTUAkxG0DUJATtFVQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"571401424354839","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"156"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231813099DD9713E9972FFBC84C0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20813,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3289},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7269319667477725967","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本三国同人文真的可以说是超牛逼了。正常来说，现在三国演义的同人文大家已经看的差不多了。基本都是千篇一律，很难让人看下去。现在很多作者弄的都是真实历史的三国志，将以此来吸引读者兴趣了。爱这本书，虽然他是完完全全的三国演义同人小说。但可以说是非常好了。作者的文补笔和剧情的严谨性都不错。完全可以说是三国神文了。","text_exts":[{"e":29,"s":25,"text":"三国演义","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774260789FFBC84C0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227269319667477725967%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227212512503647964175%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":79,"s":76,"text":"三国志","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774260789FFBC84C0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227269319667477725967%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227212512503647964175%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692520424,"group_id":"7212512503647964175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6O8M/k4Ofuhmkchyk7nV7vE3mNGocXUBn8PfywKiKV8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ef7af53d5a3b429387334c42ee12c993~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788143&x-signature=XVrxZPtz5Vs3JMU%2BONMWfnjpNI0%3D","user_id":"3518887598753696","user_name":"吾王人美如画"},"expand_extr
